ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Twitter user who posted the tweet */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source application used to post the tweet */,
  "anger" REAL /* Sentiment score for anger */,
  "disgust" REAL /* Sentiment score for disgust */,
  "fear" REAL /* Sentiment score for fear */,
  "joy" REAL /* Sentiment score for joy */,
  "sadness" REAL /* Sentiment score for sadness */,
  "surprise" REAL /* Sentiment score for surprise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the metrics */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets analyzed for the metrics */,
  "average_anger" REAL /* Average sentiment score for anger */,
  "average_disgust" REAL /* Average sentiment score for disgust */,
  "average_fear" REAL /* Average sentiment score for fear */,
  "average_joy" REAL /* Average sentiment score for joy */,
  "average_sadness" REAL /* Average sentiment score for sadness */,
  "average_surprise" REAL /* Average sentiment score for surprise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_metrics_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword being monitored for sentiment analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword's relevance or context */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the keyword belongs (e.g., sports, politics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)
